zh.Rügen, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Sa: 德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根
zh.Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Saxon: 德國薩辛-安哈爾特阿爾特馬爾可萊斯 薩爾次維德爾薩爾次維德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cacislawa von Putbus於大約1247年出生在德國薩辛-安哈爾特阿爾特馬爾可萊斯 薩爾次維德爾薩爾次維德爾時，她的父親Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II31歲，母親Margrethe de Podebuz24歲。她和Jaczo II von Gützkow至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1295年享年50歲。

zh-hans.Rügen, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Sa: 德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根
zh-hans.Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Saxon: 德国薩辛-安哈爾特阿爾特馬爾可萊斯 薩爾次維德爾薩爾次維德爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cacislawa von Putbus于大约1247年出生在德国薩辛-安哈爾特阿爾特馬爾可萊斯 薩爾次維德爾薩爾次維德爾时，她的父亲Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II31岁，母亲Margrethe de Podebuz24岁。她和Jaczo II von Gützkow至少有1个女儿。她去世于大约1295年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Putbus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from an Arabic-influenced (see Boutros ) form of the personal name Pāṭrōs ‘Peter’ (see Patros ).

variants.name: Boutros
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Samir, Ayman, Amal, Ashraf, Fadi, Fouad, Kamel, Mounir, Nabil, Ramzi, Saad, Sameh.  French Antoine, Camille, Laure, Monique, Odette, Pierre.
Arabic (Egypt, Lebanon, and Syria): from the Arabic personal name Butros, Greek Petros (see Peter ), found among Christians.

en.lifeSummary: When Cacislawa von Putbus was born about 1247, in Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, her father, Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II, was 31 and her mother, Margrethe de Podebuz, was 24. She had at least 1 daughter with Jaczo II von Gützkow. She died about 1295, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cacislawa von Putbus est née environ 1247, à Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, son père, Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margrethe de Podebuz, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Jaczo II von Gützkow. Elle est décédée environ 1295, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cacislawa von Putbus um 1247 in Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II 31 und ihre Mutter Margrethe de Podebuz 24. Sie hatte mit Jaczo II von Gützkow mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1295 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cacislawa von Putbus è nata il circa 1247 nel Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, sua padre, Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margrethe de Podebuz, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Jaczo II von Gützkow. Morì circa 1295, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Rügen, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Sa: ドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンルuジェン
ja.Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Saxon: ドイツサチセン-アンハルトアルトマーククレイス サルズウエデルサルズウエデル
ja.lifeSummary: Cacislawa von Putbusが約1247年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトアルトマーククレイス サルズウエデルサルズウエデルで生まれた時，父Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus IIは31歳，母Margrethe de Podebuzは24歳であった。彼女はJaczo II von Gützkowとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1295年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cacislawa von Putbus(이)가 대략 1247년 독일 작센-아할트 알트마k크레이스 살즈w들 살즈w들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margrethe de Podebuz(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Jaczo II von Gützkow(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1247–about 1295: tany ho any amin'ny 1247–tany ho any amin'ny 1295

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cacislawa von Putbus nasceu aproximadamente 1247, em Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, seu pai, Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margrethe de Podebuz, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Jaczo II von Gützkow. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1295, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cacislawa von Putbus родилась около 1247 г. в местности салзведель, алтмарккрис салзведель, сачсен-анэлт, Германия, её отцу по имени Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margrethe de Podebuz, 24. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Jaczo II von Gützkow. Она умерла около 1295 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.about 1247–about 1295: e tusa o le 1247–e tusa o le 1295

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cacislawa von Putbus nació aproximadamente 1247, en Salzwedel, Altmarkkreis Salzwedel, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, su papá, Stoislaw von Vilmnitz Putbus II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margrethe de Podebuz, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Jaczo II von Gützkow. Murió aproximadamente 1295, a la edad de 50 años.
